behavior_summary: Implements NPC Bane's conversational behavior when the player interacts: first-meeting greeting (uses the avatar's name), offering/assigning a Truename (Daemion), and optionally recruiting the avatar as a Disciple.

Branches dialog and outcomes based on persistent global flags (baneMet, baneHasAsked, baneJoined, baneMad, acolyteKilled, sponsorTest, keyOfTheAcolyte) and on the player's chosen responses to ask() prompts.

Uses small randomization (urandom) to pick variant lines, spawns short helper processes to sequence follow-up lines/animation/effects, and in the hostile outcome sets the NPC combat target (Npc::setTarget) so Bane attacks the player.
notable_control_flow: Entry into U8P_BANE2::0080 (main process) is an interaction/conversation trigger; it first tests baneMet to choose first-meeting versus repeat-greeting flows.
If first meeting: call getName(), compose/concatenate name-related strings, bark() greeting lines and present an ask() prompt to get the player's response about the Truename and disciple offer.
Recruitment flow: checks baneHasAsked and baneJoined to decide whether to offer or re-offer joining; writing baneHasAsked marks that the offer has been made.
Hostile branch: when baneMad or specific negative answers occur, the script may set Npc::setTarget(pid) and route to attack/dialogue that ends hostilities.
Short interaction handlers U8P_BANE2::0A03 and U8P_BANE2::0D58 are spawned or invoked for exit/brief-proximity lines; they use urandom for variants and bark() for one-line responses.
open_questions: Exact textual content and slist entries passed to Item::ask() (the option strings and their numeric codes) are not present here and remain unknown.
Precise triggers that call U8P_BANE2::0A03 and U8P_BANE2::0D58 (enterFastArea vs leaveFastArea vs explicit spawn timing) are inferred but not fully certain.
The exact logic that combines sponsorTest and keyOfTheAcolyte to influence sponsorship dialogue is inferred; the concrete thresholds/conditions are unknown.
Whether spawned helper processes perform additional state changes beyond speech (e.g., animations or additional flag writes) is unclear from disassembly.

main_function.name: U8P_BANE2::0080
main_function.purpose: Handle direct player interaction with NPC Bane: greet the player (including using the avatar name), offer or assign a Truename, propose recruitment as a Disciple, respond to the player's choices, and transition to hostile, neutral, or recruit outcomes. Also spawns helper processes for timed response sequencing and may set Bane's combat target in hostile cases.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player initiates conversation or interacts with Bane (enterFastArea-style interaction event).
Runs when dialog must be presented or when the NPC should respond to a proximity/interaction trigger.

function_map.name: U8P_BANE2::0080
function_map.role: Primary conversation/interaction handler for NPC Bane; orchestrates greeting, naming, recruiting, and hostile transitions.

function_map.name: U8P_BANE2::0A03
function_map.role: Short/exit conversation handler (leave-area or post-dialog follow-up); emits farewell or dismissive lines depending on baneMad and state; used for sequencing speech via spawn.

function_map.name: U8P_BANE2::0D58
function_map.role: Brief proximity/enter handler; chooses between polite, dismissive, or hostile one-line responses based on baneMad and urandom; used for short encounters separate from full conversation.

function_map.name: U8P_BANE2::getName
function_map.role: Engine/utility call used to obtain the avatar's displayed name for personalized greetings.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Emit dialog lines from the NPC to the player (text output).

function_map.name: Item::ask
function_map.role: Present multiple-choice prompts to the player and return the selected option; used for name/offer/acceptance dialogs.

function_map.name: urandom
function_map.role: Provide small random values to choose dialog variants.

function_map.name: spawn
function_map.role: Start helper/timed processes (U8P_BANE2::0A03, U8P_BANE2::0D58) to sequence follow-up speech or effects asynchronously.

function_map.name: Npc::setTarget
function_map.role: Make the NPC hostile by setting its combat target to the player in hostile dialogue branches.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawned/started as a short helper process to sequence follow-up or exit speech after main dialog branches.
Spawned or invoked for brief proximity responses (one-line variants) when interaction is short or the player just approaches/leaves.

external_calls.purpose: Retrieve the avatar's name string for inclusion in first-meeting greetings and Truename assignment.
Emit constructed dialog lines to the player during greeting, naming, and recruitment flows.
Present dialog choices to the player (e.g., accept Truename, accept/decline becoming Disciple) and receive the selected option for branching.
Choose between small variant sets of dialog lines to avoid robotic repetition.
Start helper processes (U8P_BANE2::0A03, U8P_BANE2::0D58) for timed follow-up speech or effects.
Set Bane's combat target to the player when the dialog reaches a hostile resolution, transitioning to combat behavior.
Emit the selected short line during exit handling.
Select variant one-line responses for quick interactions.
Emit the selected one-line response for brief proximity interactions.

reads.name: baneMet
reads.likely_effect: Distinguish first-meeting greeting (offer Truename) from repeat greetings.

reads.name: baneMad
reads.likely_effect: Switch tone of dialog to annoyed/hostile; influences choice of dismissive or aggressive lines.

reads.name: acolyteKilled
reads.likely_effect: Modify dialogue content to reflect an acolyte's death (changes wording and available responses).

reads.name: sponsorTest
reads.likely_effect: Used with keyOfTheAcolyte to alter sponsorship/training related dialog (eligibility branching).

reads.name: keyOfTheAcolyte
reads.likely_effect: Combined with sponsorTest to decide sponsor-related dialog; exact semantics inferred.

reads.name: baneHasAsked
reads.likely_effect: Check whether the recruitment question (become my Disciple) has already been presented to the player.

reads.name: baneJoined
reads.likely_effect: Indicates whether the avatar already joined Bane; affects offer wording and available actions.

writes.name: baneMet
writes.likely_effect: Set to true after the first meeting to prevent repeating first-meeting greeting/Truename offer.

writes.name: baneAvaName
writes.likely_effect: Record that Bane has assigned or noted a Truename for the avatar (marks naming completion).

writes.name: baneHasAsked
writes.likely_effect: Mark that the recruitment question has been asked so it won't be redundantly re-offered without different conditions.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Implements NPC Bane's conversational behavior when the player interacts: first-meeting greeting (uses the avatar's name), offering/assigning a Truename (Daemion), and optionally recruiting the avatar as a Disciple.
